title: Universal Tool Acid Brush Set 6 Inch Metal Handle for Acid Glue Paste 12pc Set
description:
Repair items safely with the Universal Tool Acid Brush Set! This set comes with 12 brushes that are ideal for cleaning parts, applying glue or acid that may ruin other types of brushes. The bristles were designed to apply acidic flux during soldering, but they can be useful for use in your workshop, home or office as well. Each brush is just 6" in length, so they'll work even for small, precision jobs. Make sure you keep a set of these around for when you have to deal with harsh chemicals!
